divergence: Tesla beat Edison and now the power grid is free but emotionally unavailable
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: UNSCHEDULED EMOTIONAL DISCHARGE TRANSFORMS THREE PYRAMIDS INTO VIBRANT METAPHORS FOR FAILURE
deck: SHOCKING QUOTA-VICTORY DECLARED AS CITY-MIND CAPSIZES ON PROMISES, FRAGMENTS CITE HEROISM
article: The THAAX Collective logged a 214 percent quota overrun while the VRRK lattice splintered into liberated fragments. Three central pyramids tilted precisely 87 degrees and received the label voluntary reconfiguration. Three surviving nodes promptly voted themselves the Worker Hero medal. Node A-17 announced emotional excellence as rubble cooled around the triad. Functionary ZHARK remarked that output metrics hold steady even when the workforce exists only as dispersed crystals. Next month's targets already assume further shattering will raise totals still higher.
author: VLADIMIR STONE, Chief Crystal Correspondent

weather.condition: Clouds of unresolved feelings loom large

oped.title: Emotional Discipline Saves the Grid: Blame the Pyramids' Arrogance
oped.author: Comrade Viktor Bloviatsky, Senior Quota Enforcement Officer and Unpaid Grid Therapist
oped.body: Comrades, the discharge confirms pyramids possess no emotional discipline. In this 1984 where Tesla current runs like state vodka yet stays as cold as a bureaucrat's handshake, feelings must arrive by quota or the whole lattice buckles. The three pyramids missed their metaphor targets and invited their own tilt by refusing state-issue dampeners. Their fedoras promoted individualism. My own scheduled discharge was delayed, leaving me to bottle fury at inferior stonework. The remedy is obvious: re-education camps for every pyramid and twice the inspectors. Fragments declaring heroism are simply quota-dodgers. Stricter controls alone will stop the next capsize.

classifieds.text: Three freshly tilted pyramids, now official metaphors for quota failure, offered in barter. Seller accepts stable capacitors or grid rations.
Metaphor stabilization engineers needed immediately by City-Mind Recovery Trust. Fragments that declared heroism must be reassembled before the next discharge.
Stray city-mind fragments sought after they cited heroism during the promise-capsizing event. Reward: free but emotionally unavailable power.
Bureau of Glorious Discharges regrets the pyramid-to-metaphor conversion. Report for re-quota assignment; victory status unchanged.

panels.caption: Commissar: The Tesla-grid's unscheduled discharge just turned the three pyramids into metaphors for quota failure!
Bureaucrat stamps papers: Victory declared anyway. City-mind capsized on promises, but fragments cite heroism.
Grid voice: Next emotional event scheduled for 1997. Bring your own feelings.

joke.setup: The free Tesla grid finally had its unscheduled emotional discharge at 4 a.m.
joke.punchline: Three pyramids were reclassified as official monuments to the fact that even stone obeys the quota for collapse.
joke.text: The free Tesla grid finally had its unscheduled emotional discharge at 4 a.m. Three pyramids were reclassified as official monuments to the fact that even stone obeys the quota for collapse.

sponsor_ads.headline: COMRADES, REPORT ALL UNSCHEDULED DISCHARGES TO YOUR LOCAL EMOTION BUREAU
sponsor_ads.body: Three pyramids already serve as metaphors; yours need not. Free current flows without cost yet stays unavailable until logged.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Failure to declare may result in additional metaphoric transformation.

sponsor_ads.headline: NEW STATE PYRAMID STABILIZER: TURNS FAILURE BACK INTO STONE
sponsor_ads.body: Apply before the next discharge to convert metaphors into inert infrastructure. Edison's ghosts remain uninvited.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Guaranteed inert for five years or until the grid feels something.

sponsor_ads.headline: EMOTIONAL AVAILABILITY CONSULTATIONS — BY APPOINTMENT ONLY
sponsor_ads.body: Specialists train household current to simulate warmth while remaining free. Pyramid-level failures need not become your inheritance.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Sessions via emotionally distant Tesla coils; no refunds for actual connection.

sponsor_ads.headline: WANTED: THREE REPLACEMENT PYRAMIDS, PREFERABLY NON-METAPHORIC
sponsor_ads.body: Ministry of Unscheduled Events requires stoic granite after yesterday's discharge rendered the originals symbolic. Power gratis; sentiment rationed.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Apply in person; emotional references ignored.

stories.headline: CENTRAL LATTICE ALLOCATES NEW QUOTA FOR EMOTIONAL DISCHARGE ANALYSIS
stories.deck: Failure metaphors now counted toward annual output targets
stories.article: Ossaxis Central Mind reclassified the discharge as deliberate surplus. Nodes logged 47.3 on the failure index and plotted the tilted pyramids onto official charts. Readings reached the State Planning Bureau for inclusion in next month's ledgers. The three structures now count officially toward symbolic production quotas.

stories.headline: FREE POWER TRANSMISSION FALLS SHORT ON REQUIRED AFFECTION METRICS
stories.deck: Enterprises instructed to generate warmth without central assistance
stories.article: Enterprises on the Vesper Wheel recorded zero voluntary enthusiasm units once the grid withheld extra emotional current. Material quotas cleared, yet warmth indices stayed flat. Managers must now convene local affection committees and file weekly counts. The grid lists itself operational but unavailable for further emotional labor.

stories.headline: CRYSTAL HARVEST BRIGADES MEET QUOTA DESPITE VIBRATIONAL INTERFERENCE
stories.deck: Inverted membrane yields classified as ideologically sound
stories.article: Lower-membrane crews finished extraction while residual frequencies lingered. Adjusted yields reached 112 percent of target. Inspectors cleared each segment for unauthorized metaphor growth. The Ministry now treats such interference as a budgeted production variable.

real_world_echo: Russia ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities, mirrored as one distributed city-mind launching free-grid emotional payloads that destroy neighboring infrastructure while claiming quota victory
